Package evacuation.graph

package evacuation.graph
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    evacuation
     
    evacuation.agent
     
    evacuation.routing
     
    evacuation.simulation
     
    evacuation.ui
     
  • Class
    Description
    DangerZone
    Represents a danger zone node in the evacuation graph.
    DangerZone.DangerType
    The type of danger represented by this zone.
    DangerZone.TypeDanger
    Deprecated.
    Use DangerZone.DangerType
    Edge
    Represents an edge (connection) between two nodes in the evacuation graph.
    Edge.BlockType
    The type of blockage affecting this edge.
    Edge.TypeBlocage
    Deprecated.
    Use Edge.BlockType
    Exit
    Represents an evacuation exit node in the graph.
    Graph
    Represents the evacuation graph containing nodes and edges.
    Node
    Represents a node (vertex) in the evacuation graph.
